manifest.name: IMA Sync

name: IMA Sync

releases.author: CmZhangxin
releases.description:
First public release. Sync your notes to Tencent IMA via the official OpenAPI.

## Highlights
- Folder-to-notebook routing wizard
- Push / Pull / Bidirectional sync modes
- On-save, interval, and manual triggers
- Conflict strategies (newest-wins / local / remote / keep-both / skip)

## Notes
- Desktop-only for this initial release. Mobile support is planned for a future version once it has been properly tested on iOS and Android.
- Requires app version 1.5.0 or newer.
- Bring your own IMA credentials from https://ima.qq.com/agent-interface
